title: Odysseus + Gemma-4 26B & FREE APIs: RIP Hermes & OpenClaw! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace that runs local models like Gemma through Ollama, featuring AI agents with web search and shell access, deep research capabilities, blind model comparison, and integrated productivity features like notes, memory, calendar, and email management. It supports external model providers including OpenRouter and NVIDIA NIM.
